calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani, for and with petitioner Junko Nakajima.

The Court noted that he was concerned about distributions and payment of fees made without authorization by the Court. Mr. Mitani stated that he accepted responsibility for not more fully explaining to his client how to perform the duties as administrator of the estate. He stated that no objections to the petition were received. The Court requested a revised form of order. Mr. Mitani stated that he had efiled a revised order, and delivered a courtesy copy to the Probate Examiner three days prior to the hearing. The Court noted that the revised order had not been presented to him for review, and directed that an additional courtesy copy be delivered to him. The Court granted the petition for final distribution (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy A. Jaime. (Not reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Oct-17-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani for (Personal Representative) Junko Nakajima.

Mr. Mitani reported that he met with his client, that the petition was not filed in time, that they still need one paper signed and requested a 2 week continuance. The status on filing the inventory & appraisal and a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of report on status of administration was continued to October 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that there will be no further continuances.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-13-2016 Continued To Sep-07-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Yuji Mitani for (administrator) Kinko Sakamoto.

The Court stated that it needs the final Inventory & Appraisal. Mr. Mitani responded that it was filed on 7/14/14 and provided a copy for the Court's review. The Court asked if the only asset was real property. Mr. Mitani confirmed this and stated that the bank accounts were in joint tenancy. The Court stated that the property was sold in 2014 and asked if Mr. Mitani was paid out of escrow and Mr. Mitani responded that he was not. The Court stated that it needs a petition for final distribution. Mr. Mitani stated that his client is in Japan meeting with the sole beneficiary to deliver paperwork, that she will not be back until 7/22/16 but that he will be on vacation at that time and that he can meet with her in August. The Court stated that the property was sold in 2014 and that the petition should have been filed. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to September 7, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
